x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service Operations Workspace is the primary surface where Now Assist ITOM AI insights — alert summaries, correlation recommendations, and impact analysis — are presented to operators. Without SOW active, AI-generated insights are produced but never surfaced to the people who need them.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Service Operations Workspace via sys_plugins_list.do (com.snc.service_operations_workspace). Configure SOW views for your operations team. Now Assist ITOM AI alert summaries and recommendations surface in SOW — operators cannot see AI insights without it.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c48
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Service Operations Workspace is the primary surface where Now Assist ITOM AI insights — alert summaries, correlation recommendations, and impact analysis — are presented to operators. Without SOW active, AI-generated insights are produced but never surfaced to the people who need them.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Service Operations Workspace Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("com.snc.service_operations_workspace", "com.snc.service_operations_workspace");
    // Functional fallback: check sys_scope
    if (!result.found) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_scope");
        gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_sow_itom");
        gr.addQuery("active", true);
        gr.setLimit(1);
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next()) {
            result.found = true;
            result.table = "sys_scope";
        }
    }
    if (result.found) {
        return { status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Service Operations Workspace is active | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "Service Operations Workspace is active. Now Assist ITOM AI alert summaries and recommendations are visible to the operations team." };
    } else {
        return { status: "not_ready",
            actualValue: "Service Operations Workspace not found in sys_store_app, sys_plugins, or sys_scope",
            finding: "Service Operations Workspace is not active. Now Assist ITOM AI insights are not visible to operators without SOW." };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005979</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Activate Service Operations Workspace via sys_plugins_list.do (com.snc.service_operations_workspace). Configure SOW views for your operations team. Now Assist ITOM AI alert summaries and recommendations surface in SOW — operators cannot see AI insights without it.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c48</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
